channel.title: GitHub PowerShell Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of PowerShell in GitHub

item.title: ChrisTitusTech/winutil
item.description: Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility - Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates

item.title: microsoft/winget-pkgs
item.description: The Microsoft community Windows Package Manager manifest repository

item.title: Micke-K/IntuneManagement
item.description: Copy, export, import, delete, document and compare policies and profiles in Intune and Azure with PowerShell script and WPF UI. Import ADMX files and registry settings with ADMX ingestion. View and edit PowerShell script.

item.title: hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
item.description: The Official USB Rubber Ducky Payload Repository

item.title: memstechtips/UnattendedWinstall
item.description: Personalized Unattended Answer Files that helps automatically debloat and customize Windows 10 & 11 during the installation process.

item.title: meetrevision/playbook
item.description: A lightweight, stable, and performance-focused customized version of Windows that enhances privacy and compatibility

item.title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
item.description: A simple, easy to use PowerShell script to remove pre-installed apps from Windows, disable telemetry, remove Bing from Windows search as well as perform various other changes to declutter and improve your Windows experience. This script works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

item.title: mandiant/flare-vm
item.description: A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

item.title: dotnet/core
item.description: .NET news, announcements, release notes, and more!

item.title: microsoft/ARI
item.description: Azure Resource Inventory - It's a Powerful tool to create EXCEL inventory from Azure Resources with low effort

item.title: mandiant/commando-vm
item.description: Complete Mandiant Offensive VM (Commando VM), a fully customizable Windows-based pentesting virtual machine distribution. commandovm@mandiant.com

item.title: redcanaryco/invoke-atomicredteam
item.description: Invoke-AtomicRedTeam is a PowerShell module to execute tests as defined in the [atomics folder](https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/tree/master/atomics) of Red Canary's Atomic Red Team project.
